name: Baked Bass
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the fish with lemon juice and season well, preferably overnight.
2. Chop the onion and bell pepper in margarine over medium heat until wilted.
3. Add tomato sauce and whole tomatoes; cook for 45 minutes in an uncovered pot.
4. Stir in 2 cups cold water and seasoning to taste, along with a dash of Tabasco.
5. Cook for another 25 minutes over medium heat.
6. Pour the mixture over the fish placed in a baking dish.
7. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 40 minutes, basting several times.
8. Sprinkle with parsley and onion tops; serve garnished with lemon slices.
Serves 6.
